title: bauhinia integrifolia subsp. cumingiana
intro: Bauhinia integrifolia subsp. cumingiana, also known as Philippine orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia integrifolia subsp. cumingiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
